user.title: Add Kuni
user.description: Sign in with the same email and password as the Kuni app (AWS Cognito). Every device on this account is added automatically. API host and organization are fixed in the integration code.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the API or login failed
error.no_devices: No devices were returned for this account
error.missing_dependency: The pycognito package could not be loaded. Restart Home Assistant after install.
